_publications._publicationTitle: Anti-cancer agent 3-bromopyruvate reduces growth of MPNST and inhibits metabolic pathways in a representative in-vitro model.

_contextSnippet: The corresponding concentration range for the NSF1 cells was 40 to 120 μM (p ≤ 0.017)
details: Showed significant viability reduction at 40-120 μM 3-BrPA concentration range (p ≤ 0.017)
